raw_yaml:
attack_technique: T1053.005
display_name: Scheduled Task
atomic_tests:
- name: Create Scheduled Task
  description: |
    Create a scheduled task that runs calc.exe daily at noon.
  supported_platforms: [windows]
  executor:
    command: |
      schtasks /create /tn "Updater" /tr calc.exe /sc daily /st 12:00
    name: command_prompt
- name: PowerShell Scheduled Task
  description: |
    Create a scheduled task using PowerShell cmdlets.
  supported_platforms: [windows]
  executor:
    command: |
      Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName "Test" -Action (New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute "calc.exe")
    name: powershell
